title: Require Recipe Step Source Topology
forbids: recipe step source files outside one kebab-case directory containing config.ts and step.ts, including flat files and contract/index barrel variants
why: A recipe step has one filesystem container. Requiring one kebab-case directory with config.ts and step.ts removes flat and barrel-based alternate source topologies.
remediate: Move each step beneath a kebab-case directory, rename its contract module to config.ts, rename its executable module to step.ts, and remove step barrels.
message: Recipe step source must use one kebab-case <step-directory>/{config.ts,step.ts} container.
